name: Himei Dam
short_description: "Himei Dam" is a horror game where you patrol the dam at night with your senior, who has an afro. Recommended for: People who want to be scared People who want to be surprised People who want to try working at a dam Streamers known for their great reactions
detailed_description:
"Himei Dam" is a horror game where you patrol a dam at night with your senior, who has an afro.

Recommended for:

  • People who want to be scared

  • People who want to be surprised

  • People who want to try working at a dam

  • Streamers known for their great reactions

Story:

Fragments of a story unite in the "SukuuMono" series

The setting is "Himei Dam" on Kannagi Island (Kanna-gijima).
The protagonist comes across a job listing for the Himei Dam, which offers an unusually high hourly wage, and begins working there alongside their senior, Kazami.

Features:

Horror Elements

Many strange phenomena will come after you at Himei Dam.

But be careful.

It's not just the phenomena you need to watch out for.

Every night, place protective talismans on the random occurrences to safely make it through the day.

Rich Storyline

As days pass, the secrets of Himei Dam begin to unfold.

By reading the texts scattered around the dam, the story deepens even further.

Abundant Texts

There’s plenty to read at Himei Dam—not only texts that you can read anytime,

but also texts that change daily or appear when certain conditions are met…

(You may even find information related to the series…?)

Time Attack Mode

A lot of strange events have occurred at Himei Dam!

Join the leaderboard and compete against other players for the fastest clear time!

In this mode, strange events that don't appear in the main story may also happen!

Multiple Endings

There are three possible endings in total.

Will you be able to reach the true ending?

Gamepad Support

Playtime

Approximately 1 hours to 1.5 hours (including the collection of all achievements and TimeAttackMode).

All games by Actor are available for streaming without permission. However, we would love for many people to know about and enjoy our games, so if possible, we would appreciate it if you could share the store page when posting videos or streaming! (Of course, it’s not mandatory!)

supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
